title: MelonTiers Tagger
description:
🍉 MelonTiers Tagger Mod 

The MelonTiers Tagger Mod is an official addon for MelonTiers, inspired by the TierTagger mod.

Just like TierTagger, this mod displays player tiers directly in-game, allowing you to instantly see the tier
body:
🍉 MelonTiers Tagger Mod – Description (English):

The MelonTiers Tagger Mod is an official addon for MelonTiers, inspired by the popular TierTagger mod. It brings a clean and efficient way to display player tiers directly in-game, making it easy to recognize skill levels instantly.

Instead of checking external websites or leaderboards, this mod integrates the MelonTiers ranking system straight into Minecraft. Player tiers (such as HT1, LT2, and more) are displayed clearly above nametags, in the tablist, or other UI elements depending on configuration.

✨ Key Features:

🏷️ Real-time display of player tiers above nametags
👀 Instantly identify player skill levels during PvP
📊 Supports custom MelonTiers tier systems and formats
🔄 Automatic updates using MelonTiers data
📋 Optional tablist and UI integration
⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
🎮 Perfect for PvP servers and competitive environments

The mod is designed to be simple yet powerful, offering a smooth and seamless experience without cluttering the screen. It enhances gameplay by adding more transparency and competitiveness, allowing players to better understand who they are facing.

Whether you're playing casually or competitively, the MelonTiers Tagger Mod helps you stay informed and prepared in every fight.

👉 Bringing the TierTagger experience to MelonTiers – fast, clean, and fully integrated.

Press N to open the menu
